Assistance (Subject 75% or more), 05 = Helper - Modified Dependence/Supervision (Subject 100%), 06 = No Helper/Modified Independence (Device), 07 = No Helper/Complete Independence (Timely, Safely)
113 _39HA SPHNCTR_BWL_ADMSN_CD (39Ha) Sphincter Control - Bowel: Admission CHAR 2 A score indicating the level of assistance needed for the patient's bowel management at admission. Bowel management - level of assistance includes use of equipment or agents for bowel management. 01 = Helper - Complete
